subcodes.title: Words to Baha'is of Stuttgart (via Lady Blomfield)
subcodes.first_line: Rejoice! Rejoice! Because of the Glad-tidings! You have attained to the light of the Kingdom. The glory of the Sun of Truth
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @The Holy Spirit
